title: ononis angustissima falcata
intro: Ononis angustissima falcata, also known as the Narrow-leaved Spurred Restharrow or Falcate Restharrow, is a perennial flowering plant in the legume family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ononis angustissima falcata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
